markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if certified election results are published.
markets.no_sub_title: Venstre
markets.rules_primary: If Venstre finishes in 3rd place in the 2026 Danish general election according to the certified results, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Ranking is determined by the specified counting method:
For plurality voting: rank is based on vote count or percentage
For ranked choice voting: rank is determined by elimination order (runner-up is eliminated in final round for second place)
For two-round systems: rank is based on final round results if it proceeds to second round, otherwise first-round totals
For proportional representation: rank follows the electoral authority's final seat allocation order

In case of exact ties, markets resolve proportionally (1/number of tied entities). Write-in candidates achieving the specified rank resolve all named candidate markets to NO unless a specific "Write-in" or "Other" option exists. Candidates who withdraw or are disqualified after the filing deadline but remain on the ballot are ranked based on votes received. If the election is cancelled or postponed beyond expiration, all markets resolve to NO.
markets.title: Will Venstre finish 3rd in the 2026 Danish general election?
markets.yes_sub_title: Venstre

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if certified election results are published.
markets.no_sub_title: Venstre
markets.rules_primary: If Venstre finishes in 2nd place in the 2026 Danish general election according to the certified results, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Ranking is determined by the specified counting method:
For plurality voting: rank is based on vote count or percentage
For ranked choice voting: rank is determined by elimination order (runner-up is eliminated in final round for second place)
For two-round systems: rank is based on final round results if it proceeds to second round, otherwise first-round totals
For proportional representation: rank follows the electoral authority's final seat allocation order

In case of exact ties, markets resolve proportionally (1/number of tied entities). Write-in candidates achieving the specified rank resolve all named candidate markets to NO unless a specific "Write-in" or "Other" option exists. Candidates who withdraw or are disqualified after the filing deadline but remain on the ballot are ranked based on votes received. If the election is cancelled or postponed beyond expiration, all markets resolve to NO.
markets.title: Will Venstre finish 2nd in the 2026 Danish general election?
markets.yes_sub_title: Venstre

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if certified election results are published.
markets.no_sub_title: Denmark Democrats
markets.rules_primary: If Denmark Democrats finishes in 2nd place in the 2026 Danish general election according to the certified results, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Ranking is determined by the specified counting method:
For plurality voting: rank is based on vote count or percentage
For ranked choice voting: rank is determined by elimination order (runner-up is eliminated in final round for second place)
For two-round systems: rank is based on final round results if it proceeds to second round, otherwise first-round totals
For proportional representation: rank follows the electoral authority's final seat allocation order

In case of exact ties, markets resolve proportionally (1/number of tied entities). Write-in candidates achieving the specified rank resolve all named candidate markets to NO unless a specific "Write-in" or "Other" option exists. Candidates who withdraw or are disqualified after the filing deadline but remain on the ballot are ranked based on votes received. If the election is cancelled or postponed beyond expiration, all markets resolve to NO.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Trump / President
markets.rules_primary: If Zohran Mamdani says Trump / President as part of next NYC Mayor's Office announcement, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the next NYC Mayor's Office announcement will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the next NYC Mayor's Office announcement will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
- The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. - Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
- For the purposes of this market, “next NYC Mayor's Office announcement” refers to the first livestream on the NYC Mayor's Office main YouTube channel (@NYCMayorsOffice) after March 9th, 2026 at 11:45 AM ET. 
- The livestream will resolve based on Zohran Mamdani speaking in an official capacity. If Zohran Mamdani is present during a livestream, but does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).
- Additional source agency streams can be used in the event of technical outages or if the NYC Mayor's Office ends the stream prior to the conclusion of the event.
- The event must be opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event to qualify.
- Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
- Please see full rules for more details.
markets.title: What will Zohran Mamdani say during next NYC Mayor's Office announcement?
markets.yes_sub_title: Trump / President
